name: Caribbean Reef Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle salt and pepper over washed and dried chicken. Set aside.
2. In a small bowl, mix together sugar, 2 tablespoons of rum, lime juice, lemon pepper, ginger, cloves, cinnamon, garlic powder, and hot pepper sauce to make Caribbean paste. Set aside.
3. Place the chicken, skin side up, in a large shallow baking pan. Rub the Caribbean paste evenly over the chicken.
4. Bake in a 400°F oven for 45 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender.
5. In a blender, mix chutney and the remaining 2 tablespoons of rum to make a warm sauce. Spoon the sauce over the chicken and bake for an additional 3 minutes or until the chutney is warm.
6. Arrange the chicken on a serving platter. Garnish with lime, lemon, and parsley.
